postToolUse.bash: bash -lc 'command -v terraform >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; command -v tflint >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; cd "$root" || exit 0; mapfile -t files < <({ git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -- "*.tf" "*.tfvars" "*.hcl"; git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR -- "*.tf" "*.tfvars" "*.hcl"; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard -- "*.tf" "*.tfvars" "*.hcl"; } | awk "NF" | sort -u); [[ ${#files[@]} -eq 0 ]] && exit 0; declare -A seen; dirs=(); for f in "${files[@]}"; do d=$(dirname "$f"); [[ -n "${seen[$d]}" ]] && continue; seen[$d]=1; dirs+=("$d"); done; for dir in "${dirs[@]}"; do [[ -d "$dir" ]] || continue; terraform -chdir="$dir" validate -no-color; tflint --init --chdir "$dir" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; tflint --chdir "$dir"; done'
